sweetie: Hi.
Speaker 2: Hi.
Speaker 3: Hi darling.
sweetie: So, what's this.
Speaker 2: Some of your old stuff.
Speaker 3: Well sweetie, we have a surprise for you. We're turning your room into a gym.
sweetie: Wow, that is a surprise. Just one little question, uh, why not Ross's room?
Speaker 2: Gosh, we talked about that but your brother has so many science trophies and plaques and merit badges, well we didn't want to disturb them.
sweetie: Oh, God forbid.
